summary_en: 417,000 shares (13.99% of voting rights) acquired by Tasuge Sogyō on 2026-05-22 from three related parties (Tsuneo Sugiyama, Ikuo Tashiro, Yoshihisa Fujii) who are NCN shareholders. Constitutes statutory buy-in under FIEL Article 167(1) and Ordinance Article 31. Acquirer intends long-term stable ownership.
title_en: Notice regarding prescribed buy-in conduct equivalent to a public tender offer for New Constructor's Network Co., Ltd. (Stock Code 7057)
translation_en_brief:
On 2026-05-22, NCN (ticker 7057) disclosed that Tasuge Sogyō K.K., a company owned by related party Ikuo Tashiro, has acquired 417,000 shares of NCN from three individual shareholders: Tsuneo Sugiyama (NCN honorary advisor), Ikuo Tashiro (NCN representative director and CEO), and Yoshihisa Fujii (NCN managing director). The acquisition represents 13.99% of total voting rights as of 2026-03-31 (29,812 voting units outstanding).

The transaction constitutes a prescribed buy-in conduct under Financial Instruments and Exchange Law Article 167(1) and Ordinance Article 31, requiring statutory notification. Tasuge Sogyō states its intention to hold the shares long-term as a stable shareholder, signaling no intent to acquire remaining shares or change NCN's listing status. The disclosure was filed by NCN at Tasuge Sogyō's request under Ordinance Article 30(1)(4).
